proposal.title: # Appoint Volky as nouns-monorepo (Nouns.wtf + dev tooling) maintainer
proposal.description:
# Appoint Volky as nouns-monorepo (Nouns.wtf + dev tooling) maintainer

Hey folks. Volky here 👋

Following up from the discussion started in [[IDEA] Add All Approved Nouns Clients to Nouns.wtf](https://www.nouns.camp/topics/%5Bidea%5D-add-all-approved-nouns-clients-to-nouns.wtf-39a7ea92f59d74a950e4a08990519ee44ef3abc0)

I'm requesting admin access to [https://github.com/nounsDAO/nouns-monorepo](https://github.com/nounsDAO/nouns-monorepo) so that I can help with:

- nouns.wtf updates  
- processing the backlog of issues + PRs in the repo  
- updating the developer tooling  
- adding guidelines for contributions  
- integrating contributions from the community 

I vouch to always consult the DAO before making opinionated public-facing changes (e.g. adding new content to nouns.wtf)

## Why Volky

I'm a full-stack developer, with ample experience with Typescript and Solidity ()

I have extensive experience specifically with the Nouns contracts and the rest of the codebase:

- I've built [Noundry Studio](https://studio.noundry.wtf) for artists to create Nouns traits  
- I've built [Nomo Nouns](https://nomo.wtf), a game where players can "rescue" Nouns that did not make it to the auction  
- I've built a [Nouns governance client for Gnars](https://gnars.wtf) from the ground up  
- I've built [Noundry Gallery](https://gallery.noundry.wtf), allowing artists to propose new traits to the DAO 

## Compensation

For compensation, I intend to eventually set up a [Nounish Software](https://flows.wtf/flow/0x9dc54d2b8ee696f6ee4b31a41a719e6ccd1b909c021698a40727f6f0c1a257c1) Flow
